description: Remove executable bits from schemas and JSON/JSONL fixtures and enforce the invariant in tests.
acceptance: Tracked JSON, JSONL, YAML, Markdown, and schema artifacts are not executable.

evidence.summary: TDD RED listed 18 executable data contracts across stack/template. GREEN normalizes all tracked JSON/JSONL/YAML/Markdown/SVG data artifacts and preserves true executable scripts. Verification: scripts/check-linux.sh 75 tests and pairing green; pilots green.
